user.bio: Graduate student in Computer Science with a strong background in full-stack web development and Computer Engineering. Passionate about building scalable applications and growing as a full-stack engineer, with experience leading technical teams and contributing to various software projects.

workExperience.description: Assisting in teaching and research activities in the Computer Science department.
Developed various web applications: a boutique store webpage, a portfolio management system for the Nepal Stock Exchange, and an Animal Finder application.
Led the merger of three departments into a Frontend Department, implemented micro frontends and mono-repo, and improved code quality and coverage.
Managed an 8-member team for the Employee Evaluation System, organized a Code Camp, and conducted knowledge-sharing sessions.
Built the Digital Lending System, integrating various services, and led a team for the Nepal Audit Management System.
Developed the Advertisement Management System, enhanced projects with Kanban boards and WYSIWYG editors, and introduced TypeScript in React.
Developed the Weapon Inventory Management System for Nepal Police, improved the Online Police Clearance Report system, and created a data visualization module.
Contributed to real-world projects and produced project documentation.
Developed and delivered training programs for Node.js and React Js.
